behavior.on_blank: Clears output, hides error, removes data-stale.
behavior.on_render_ok: Renderer writes into output container; error region hidden; data-stale removed.
behavior.on_render_fail: Output cleared and marked data-stale='true'; error region shown with non-empty message.
behavior.no_button: Updates are driven only by inputUi.onLatexChange — there is no render/submit button.

verification_notes: Wiring contains no submit button. Stale marker applied. Error message routed to error region only on failure.
